glyph.name: Red Dragon
glyph.explanation: Energetic, powerful, protective, sensitive, private, initiating, primordial mother, blood memory, creative energy, supportive

glyph.name: White Wind
glyph.explanation: Agile, divine breath, clever, multifaceted, inspiration to all, idealistic, mental, presence of truth, spiritual, romantic

glyph.name: Blue Night
glyph.explanation: Mysterious, logical, powerful, conservative, thoughtful, organized, introspective, deep, strength to endure, possibility

glyph.name: Yellow Seed
glyph.explanation: Active Dynamic, spiritual creator, potentiality, leader, performer, influence

glyph.name: Red Serpent
glyph.explanation: Passionate, resourceful, headstrong, intimate, passionate, creative, sensual, instinctual, extremist, charismatic

glyph.name: White Worldbridger
glyph.explanation: Forgiveness, surrender, transformer, conscious, humble, transmutation, multidimensional, community oriented, grounded in spirit

glyph.name: Blue Hand
glyph.explanation: Generous, peaceful, opener of gateways, comprehender, grasper, cooperative, artistic, manifester, healer, competent, inspiring, skillful

glyph.name: Yellow Star
glyph.explanation: Harmony, expansion, wayshower, clever, hopeful, energetic, inspirational, nervous, playful, loving, busy, starred, intelligent

glyph.name: Red Moon
glyph.explanation: Imaginative, emotional, self-remembering, communicator, fantasy prone, mutable, aware, strong in feelings, romantic, expander

glyph.name: White Dog
glyph.explanation: Loyal, helpful, mellow, strong leader, guardian, companion, consistent, faithful, team player, joiner

glyph.name: Blue Monkey
glyph.explanation: Artistic, spontaneous, trickster, innocent, humorous, extraordinary, divine clown, curious, co-creator of higher life, transparent, communicative

glyph.name: Yellow Human
glyph.explanation: Creator, holder of the chalice, vessel of higher power, quickener, responsible, straightforward, harvester, abundant, hard worker

glyph.name: Red Skywalker
glyph.explanation: Accomplished, popular, pillar of heaven & earth, knowledgeable, time & space traveler, crusader, assumes challenges, socially principled

glyph.name: White Wizard
glyph.explanation: Psychic, intelligent, aligned with divine will, magician, sensitive, torch bearer, heart knowing, shaman, concerned with spirituality

glyph.name: Blue Eagle
glyph.explanation: Independent, committed, artistic, compassionate, exacting, receiver, visionary, believes in self, dreamer, technically inclined, scientific, hopeful

glyph.name: Yellow Warrior
glyph.explanation: Trustworthy, realistic, wise, mystical, graceful, receptive transmitter, divine communicator, deep, status conscious, high standards, pragmatic

glyph.name: Red Earth
glyph.explanation: Synchronizes, tracks clues, grounds, collects synergy, governs earth force, shields, earth keeper, crystal healer, liberal, confident

glyph.name: White Mirror
glyph.explanation: Pure, faces the shadow, self sacrificing, discriminator, ritualistic, discipliner, sword of wisdom, well coordinated, clarity, timeless, practical, meditative

glyph.name: Blue Storm
glyph.explanation: Friendly, transformer, clarifier, multifaceted, liberator of the mind, light body, activator for ascension, initiates by fire, reunites, excellent teacher

glyph.name: Yellow Sun
glyph.explanation: Loving, unified whole, blissful, Christ consciousness, romantic, limitless, dreamy, creative, uncompromising, rejuvenating, well-intentioned, devoted
